runtime_impact: Visual evolution. The .actor shared shell loses its border/background/border-radius — actors render as zones in an atmospheric field rather than as cards. Per-mode .rep-field gradients add atmospheric signatures (BALANCED state-color landscape, DENSE three pressure-tier glow centers, INVESTIGATION blue-to-yellow corridor, BOARDROOM single central radial). Resolution Boundary cells, Topology cells, Signal Stack rows all dissolve their borders into rails-and-glow zones. Inference Prohibition gains a governance contour. BOARDROOM Confidence Envelope ring grows from 220px to 320px with two additional outer atmospheric rings. ExecutiveInterpretation becomes mode-reactive (label / tone / section labels / accent color per lens). No behavior change to render-state vocabulary, qualifier semantics, propagation logic, governance pass/fail, evidence-block content. No new API endpoints. Route compiles and renders cleanly at HTTP 200 across all four lenses.
notes: Single source-file change. Adds INTERP_MODE_FRAMING constant. Modifies .actor shell, .rep-field per-mode gradients, .actor-resolution-cell, .actor-topo-cell, .actor-signal-row, .actor-inference-statement, .actor-absorption-panel, .rep-board-envelope, .rep-board-envelope-state. 8 Playwright screenshots produced as visual evidence. No new dependencies. Static report artifacts continue as named references only — no HTML body inlined. Substrate hydration is visually implied via lineage hashes / applied-rule chips / backing-state differentiation / field gradients.
